title: Paraceterach sargentii
taxonomy: Paraceterach sargentii is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This classification places it within the division Pteridophyta, which comprises all ferns. As a member of the family Polypodiaceae, Paraceterach sargentii is closely related to other species such as Pyrrosia and Drymoglossum. The genus Paraceterach is part of the order Polypodiales, which includes a wide range of fern species. Within the family Polypodiaceae, Paraceterach sargentii is further classified based on its specific characteristics and morphological features.
